message:
test(oracle): add 8 conformance tests: derived tables, NULL, ORDER BY, math

Tests cover: derived table aliases (subquery in FROM), NULL in expressions
and operators, complex ORDER BY with expressions/aliases/CASE/functions,
UPDATE multi-SET, GROUP_CONCAT ordering, LIMIT edge values, INSERT OR
IGNORE conflict handling, math functions (abs, round, sign, min, max).

All pass with 0 mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
